identity.name: Intensiti Design System
identity.description: A high-precision interface for managing digital chaos. Visually quiet to allow the content (images/videos) to speak. Interaction design is snappy and immediate.

typography.rules: Use Outfit for all Headings (h1-h4) and Navigation links. Use Inter for all body text, inputs, and tables. Use JetBrains Mono for pairing codes and technical IDs.

admin_structure.sidebar: w-64 hidden md:flex flex-col border-r bg-white

display_structure.header_zone: absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-[15vh] z-20 flex items-center justify-between px-8 bg-gradient-to-b from-black/50 to-transparent
display_structure.main_zone: absolute inset-0 z-10 flex items-center justify-center
display_structure.footer_zone: absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-[10vh] z-30 bg-black/80 flex items-center overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-indigo-600 text-white hover:bg-indigo-700 shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors
buttons.destructive: bg-rose-600 text-white hover:bg-rose-700 shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors

cards.base: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm transition-shadow hover:shadow-md
cards.screen_preview: aspect-video bg-slate-100 rounded-lg border border-slate-200 overflow-hidden relative group

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50
inputs.label: text-sm font-medium leading-none peer-disabled:cursor-not-allowed peer-disabled:opacity-70 mb-2 block

screen_dashboard.grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6
screen_dashboard.status_indicator: h-2 w-2 rounded-full absolute top-4 right-4 ring-2 ring-white

playlist_editor.timeline_area: flex-1 bg-slate-100 rounded-lg p-6 overflow-x-auto flex items-center gap-4
playlist_editor.slide_card: w-48 aspect-video bg-white shadow-sm rounded-md flex-shrink-0 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-indigo-500 cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing relative group

universal_guidelines.general: Do not use 'airplane cockpit' density. Keep it sparse. Every screen must have a clear primary action.
universal_guidelines.language: Interface text must be in French (Français).
universal_guidelines.accessibility: Ensure high contrast on the Player view (white text on dark backgrounds with drop shadows).
universal_guidelines.layout_rule: Use 'flex' and 'grid' pervasively. Avoid absolute positioning except in the 'Screen Display View'.
universal_guidelines.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes (e.g., 'login-submit-btn', 'playlist-add-slide-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Screen Display View' as a separate route (e.g., /display/:code) that removes all admin UI chrome.
Ensure the Admin Dashboard uses the Light Theme defined in 'colors'.
The 'Playlist Editor' should support drag-and-drop reordering (use 'dnd-kit' or similar if possible, or simple array manipulation).
Respect the 'French Language' constraint for all labels.
